t_ch: 你过得怎么样？
t_en: How have you been?

t_ch: 还不错。
t_en: Pretty good.

t_ch: 哦。
t_en: Oh.

t_ch: …你还有什么话想跟我说吗？
t_en: ...Anything else you'd like to say to me?

t_ch: 没什么了。
t_en: Um... Nothing.

t_ch: …保重了，阿月。
t_en: ...Take care, A-Yue.

t_ch: …你也保重，妹妹。
t_en: ...You too, little sister.

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 妹妹？
t_en: Little sister!?

t_ch: 阿月面色凝重，保持着沉默，周遭的空气似乎也凝滞了起来。
t_en: A-Yue maintains a solemn, silent expression as the air around her seems to freeze.

t_ch: 过了好一会儿，她深深地吸了一口气，这才开口打破这份尴尬的寂静。
t_en: After a while, she takes a deep breath to finally break this most awkward of silences.

t_ch: 我过得很好，你不用担心。
t_en: I've been fine. You don't have to worry.

t_ch: …你就安心地…回去吧。
t_en: ...You can go... with your mind at ease.

t_ch: 说完这句话，她如释重负地叹了口气，你注意到她的眼眶边缘微微发红。
t_en: As she says this, she lets out a deep sigh of relief and you notice the rims of her eyes becoming red.

t_ch: 你们目送着阿月离去的身影，直至隐没在夜色中，这才松了口气。
t_en: You watch A-Yue as she leaves until she's lost to the night, before letting out your own sigh of relief.

t_ch: 总算结束了。接下来咱们也该分道扬镳了，再见了各位！
t_en: It's finally over. Now it's time for us to part ways. Goodbye, all!

t_ch: 你打算往哪儿走？不是说好了只要把你放出来，跟我走也没关系吗？岁阳还真是狡猾啊！
t_en: Where do you think you're going? Didn't you promise that you'd do anything so long as we helped you get out of there? Heliobi really are tricky!

t_ch: 快点进到葫芦里来！
t_en: Get into the gourd now!

t_ch: 好。
t_en: Alright.

t_ch: 这家伙有点狡猾，还是回绥园一趟吧，不将它镇伏下来我始终有点不放心……
t_en: This one's slippery. Better get back to Fyxestroll Garden. I won't be able to relax until it's subdued there...

t_ch: 虽说是个乌龙，但总感觉有哪里不对。
t_en: Even though it was all just a mistake, something still somehow felt wrong.

t_ch: 她们两姐妹说话太难懂了，像云骑军里对暗号似的。
t_en: Those sisters are hard to understand. It's like the Cloud Knights and their passphrases.

t_ch: 明明都魔阴身了，却因为姐姐的事强撑着一口气在…难怪岁阳会附身在她身上。
t_en: She's already mara-struck, but she still managed to hang in there all because of her big sister... No wonder the heliobus possessed her.

t_ch: 可惜…自己的妹妹失联多年…再见面却是这种场面。
t_en: It's a pity... To have lost touch with your own little sister for years... But when you meet again, it all plays out just like this.

t_ch: 那个阿月，大概是知道的吧？
t_en: A-Yue, do you think she... already knows?

t_ch: 知道什么？
t_en: Knows what?

t_ch: 我是说，她妹妹不在人世这件事，看她最后那个样子，感觉是知道的。
t_en: I mean, knows that her sister's already passed away? Seeing her final expression, it felt like she knew.

t_ch: 我也觉得……
t_en: I think so, too...

t_ch: 她最后好像是哭了？
t_en: She was crying at the end, right?

t_ch: 她说的那句话已经是明示了吧。
t_en: That last line of hers was a clear indication.

t_ch: 你观察得好仔细啊，我压根都没注意到这些细节！
t_en: What a careful observation! There's absolutely no way I could've noticed that detail!

t_ch: 嗯，看她那样，估计要回去好好消化一段时间了。
t_en: Yeah. Seeing how she was, she would probably need to go back and digest things for a while.

t_ch: 总感觉她们之间还有很多…很多故事。
t_en: It feels like those two have quite a few... stories between them.

t_ch: 但当事人自己不愿意说，我们也不好贸然打探人家隐私。
t_en: But if the people involved aren't willing to say, then we can't just make rash inquiries into their personal affairs.

t_ch: 算了算了，「夜半惊魂」什么的事好歹算是解决了。她俩能再见面也算是某种团圆了嘛。
t_en: Ah, forget it. This "midnight terror" or whatever is now resolved. The two of them meeting up again is like some kind of reunion.

t_ch: 按照流程，完成了委托，还是得发点东西…那么就拜托你啦，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Based on official processes, something should get sent now that an assignment has been completed... I thank you for your efforts, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 辛苦了！今天就先这样吧，大家早点回去休息吧，回见！
t_en: Great job! That's all for today. Head home early, everyone. See you all later!

t_ch: 家人们，你们看到这条消息了吗？绝对劲爆！
t_en: Fam, have you seen this news? This is huge!

t_ch: 我已经想好下一篇怪谈该怎么写了！标题就叫……
t_en: I've already thought of the plot for the next ghost story! The title will be...

t_ch: 震惊！半夜鬼哭究竟何人所为？
t_en: OMG! Midnight Ghostly Crying Exposed: You Won't Believe What's Behind It!

t_ch: 劲爆！不明飞行物背后的真相。
t_en: BOMBSHELL! Unmasking the mystery behind the Unidentified Flying Object

t_ch: 超燃！捉鬼小队力克无形孽物！
t_en: EPIC! Ghost-Hunting Squad majestically OWNS Invisible Abomination!

t_ch: 不错不错，你挺上道的嘛~
t_en: Not bad, not bad at all. You're pretty good at this.

t_ch: 依我看，这次估计也是岁阳作祟——你们记得浮烟最后爆炸变成了漫天的火雨吗？
t_en: In my opinion, a heliobus should be behind this incident too — do you remember how Cirrus finally exploded into a rain of fire down from the sky?

t_ch: 这「天上的恸哭声」…有可能是那时四散逃走的碎片，那…尾巴也许就在其中！
t_en: "Mournful Cries in the Sky"... It's possible these originate from all the fleeing fragments from back then. Then... Tail might be among them!

t_ch: 如果真是岁阳在天上作乱的话...咱们有谁会飞吗？
t_en: If it's really a heliobus causing trouble in the sky... Who among us can fly?

t_ch: 十王司肯定有办法的，对吧藿藿？
t_en: I'm sure the Ten-Lords Commission has a way, right, Huohuo?

t_ch: 十王司的判官…也不会飞啊。
t_en: Being a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission... doesn't really let you fly.

t_ch: 这下可愁人了，要是岁阳碎片都往天上躲，咱们岂不是只能坐等它自己下来？
t_en: This is bothersome. If the heliobus' fragments are hiding in the sky, are we supposed to wait for them to fall?

t_ch: 让我想想…我们该怎么办……
t_en: Let me think... what should we do...

t_ch: 有办法了，{NICKNAME}方便跟我来一趟吗？我、我有个想法。
t_en: I've an idea. {NICKNAME}, can you come with me? I—I thought of something.

t_ch: 真不愧是十王司判官。
t_en: As expected from our Ten-Lords Commission Judge.

t_ch: 听寒鸦大人说藿藿以前就很擅长整备十王司的道具，不愧是专家呀。
t_en: Heard from Hanya that Huohuo has been very good at organizing the props of the Ten-Lords Commission, so she's no less of an expert.

t_ch: 没有没有，唔，别、别夸我啦……
t_en: No, no. Hmm, do—don't praise me like that.

t_ch: 素裳，你们不来吗？
t_en: Sushang, aren't you coming?

t_ch: 我已经预定素裳跟我探查林中小屋了，这件事就交给你和藿藿了。
t_en: I've asked Sushang to investigate the forest cottage with me, so we'll leave this matter to you and Huohuo.

t_ch: 那我和素裳去忙啦，有什么问题随时联系！
t_en: We'll get to work then. Contact us if you've any questions!

t_ch: 藿藿大人，您需要的「物流机巧鸟」已经备妥。
t_en: Judge Huohuo, the courier cycrane you need is ready.

t_ch: …被叫作「大人」还是有些不习惯，麻烦你了。
t_en: ...I'm still not used to be addressed as a Judge, but thanks.

t_ch: 大人请看……
t_en: Judge, here...

t_ch: 这就是藿藿大人指定的「飞行式藏月瓠移动平台」，简称「降魔机巧鸟」。
t_en: This is the Flying Lunaumbra Gourd Mobile Platform, AKA, exorcist cycrane you've requested for, Judge Huohuo.

t_ch: 它...绑了一个快递箱？
t_en: It... comes with a courier package?

t_ch: 您真是好眼力——没错，快递箱里还放着藏月瓠！
t_en: That's very observant of you. The Lunaumbra Gourd is in the courier package!

t_ch: 我怎么没看出来区别？
t_en: How come I don't see a difference?

t_ch: 从外观上看，它和普通的物流机巧鸟没有任何区别，但快递箱里放着「藏月瓠」！
t_en: Its appearance may not look different from an ordinary courier cycrane, but there's a Lunaumbra Gourd in the courier package!

t_ch: 只要能实现「带着藏月瓠飞行」的目的，其实也挺简单的。
t_en: Whatever that fulfills the purpose of "flying with the Lunaumbra Gourd," I guess. It's actually pretty easy to operate.

t_ch: 高端法器往往只需要简单处理。
t_en: High-tech sacred instruments are usually easy to handle.

t_ch: 还以为有什么大发明……
t_en: I thought this was going to be a big invention or something...

t_ch: 这么短的时间，您倒是说说我怎么给您搞个大发明啊。
t_en: Please tell me how I can come out with a big invention for you on short notice.

t_ch: 总之，这台机巧鸟就归藿藿大人调遣了。
t_en: Anyway, this cycrane is at the disposal of Judge Huohuo.

t_ch: 我们...有谁会用机巧鸟吗？
t_en: Among us... do we have anyone who knows how to operate a cycrane?

t_ch: 你注意到两人目光一致，看向了你。
t_en: You notice the two of them looking at you inquisitively.

t_ch: 没错，就是我。
t_en: That's me.

t_ch: 别看我，我不会。
t_en: Don't look at me like that. I don't know how.

t_ch: 别谦虚了，都拜托你了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: There's no need to be humble. I'll leave it to you then, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我用机巧鸟救下过驭空的千金。
t_en: I once used a cycrane to rescue Madam Yukong's daughter.

t_ch: 拜托你了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I'll leave it to you then, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 「降魔机巧鸟」，启动！
t_en: Cycrane, start!

t_ch: 这算是验证了「降魔机巧鸟」的可行性。藿藿大人请在使用完成后，及时返还。
t_en: I suppose this verifies the feasibility of the exorcist cycrane. Judge Huohuo, please return it in a timely fashion after using it.

t_ch: 好的。走吧{NICKNAME}，我们该去那条帖子提到的地方看看了。
t_en: I will. Let's get moving, {NICKNAME}. We should take a look at the place mentioned in the post.

t_ch: 应该就是这些岁阳了，{NICKNAME}，准备好了吗？
t_en: It should be the heliobus. {NICKNAME}, are you ready?

t_ch: 「降魔机巧鸟」，启动！
t_en: Cycrane, start!

t_ch: 稍等一下，我还没准备好。
t_en: Hold on. I'm not ready.

t_ch: 没关系，我会等你准备好的。
t_en: It's fine. I'll wait for you to get ready.

t_ch: 嚣张的岁阳不再逃窜，回到了地面上……
t_en: The arrogant heliobus stops fleeing and returns to the ground...

t_ch: 还不错，{M#小子}{F#丫头}，这是我出逃以来玩得最开心的一次。
t_en: Not bad, {M#boy}{F#girl}. This is the most exciting adventure I've ever had.

t_ch: 你、你到底有什么目的？
t_en: Wh—What's your intention?

t_ch: 只是想玩玩而已。你要是被关在炉子里，你也会无聊到闲出屁来。
t_en: I'm just out to have fun. If you're the one being locked in the furnace, you'll find ways to escape from that boring place too.

t_ch: 能这样痛快玩一遭，我也没什么好不满的。有种就别让我再逃出来，再让我逃出来我……
t_en: To be able to enjoy myself like this, I guess there's nothing I'm unhappy about. If you got nerve, then don't let me escape again. Or else, I'll...

t_ch: 废话少说，进来吧你！
t_en: Shut up and go in!

t_ch: 咦？{NICKNAME}，还有这位是…？
t_en: Huh? {NICKNAME} and who's this?

t_ch: 你好，我是十王司的藿藿，你刚才有没有遇到什么…嗯，奇怪的事？
t_en: Greetings. I am Huohuo from the Ten-Lords Commission. Did you meet any... uh, strange occurrence?

t_ch: 奇怪的事？没有，不过我拍了几张景色很好的照片。
t_en: Strange occurrence? No, but I did manage to capture some beautiful shots of the scenery.

t_ch: 这、这样吧，请将这个符箓带在身上，如果…有什么事的话，应该会有反应。
t_en: H—How about this? Take this talisman with you. If... something happens to you, it will react.

t_ch: 藿藿将符箓贴在三月七身上，什么也没有发生。
t_en: Huohuo pastes the talisman on March 7th. Nothing happens.

t_ch: 这是没有事的意思吗？
t_en: Does this mean I'm fine?

t_ch: …应、应该是没有事的。
t_en: ...I—I suppose so.

t_ch: 相信我们就好，三月。
t_en: Believe in us, March.

t_ch: 唔，既然{NICKNAME}这么说的话，本姑娘就当什么都没发生过好了～
t_en: Hmm, since {NICKNAME} said so, I'll take it as if nothing happened.

t_ch: 三月小姐别担心。总、总之，我们先回绥园吧，藏月瓠里的…东西还需要镇伏呢。
t_en: Miss March, don't worry. I—In any case, we will return to Fyxestroll Garden. The thing... in the Lunaumbra Gourd needs to be restrained.

t_ch: 那只叫作星燏的岁阳，说自己离开造化洪炉只是为了自由，其他的岁阳也是这样吗？
t_en: That heliobus named Stafyre said it left the Creation Furnace for freedom. Do you think the other heliobi are the same?

t_ch: 你担心自己限制了尾巴的自由？
t_en: Are you worried that you've restrained Tail's freedom?

t_ch: 也许尾巴已经离开了罗浮仙舟？
t_en: Maybe Tail has left the Xianzhou Luofu?

t_ch: 也许吧，我也不知道。总之，现在先发个帖子，让那里的人安心吧。
t_en: Perhaps. I don't know, too. Anyway, let's publish a post to put the people there at ease.

t_ch: 虽然没找到跟尾巴有关的线索，不过还是谢谢你了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Even though we did not find any clues about Tail, I'm still grateful to you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 之后我会继续找下去。尾巴比星燏强大许多，它一定不会有事的...嗯，不会有事的。
t_en: I will continue to search for Tail. It is much stronger than Stafyre, and I'm sure it will be fine... Yes, nothing will happen to it.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你准备好了吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, are you ready?

t_ch: 「降魔机巧鸟」，启动！
t_en: Cycrane, start!

t_ch: 稍等一下，我还没准备好。
t_en: Hold on. I'm not ready.

t_ch: 没关系，我会等你准备好的。
t_en: It's fine. I'll wait for you to get ready.

t_ch: 呼…总算解决这个难缠的家伙了。
t_en: Phew... We've finally settled this troublemaker.

t_ch: 还剩下一些岁阳碎片，我们慢慢处理吧。
t_en: There are still some fragments left. Let's take our time with this.

t_ch: 我拍了几张景色很好的照片，无论看多少遍大衍穷观阵，咱都觉得很神奇。
t_en: I took a few nice scenic pictures. No matter how many times I see the Matrix of Prescience Ultima, I always think it's really something fantastical.

t_ch: 你准备好驾驶机巧鸟了吗？
t_en: Are you ready to pilot the cycrane?

t_ch: 我准备好了。
t_en: I'm ready.

t_ch: 「降魔机巧鸟」，启动！
t_en: Cycrane, start!

t_ch: 再等等。
t_en: One sec.

t_ch: 只要操控机巧鸟靠近这些岁阳碎片，藏月瓠就会自动将它们吸锁收服。
t_en: We just need to move the cycrane closer to these heliobus fragments, and the Lunaumbra Gourd will capture them.

t_ch: 机巧鸟负责靠近…箱子里的藏月瓠负责将岁阳收伏。
t_en: Move the cycrane closer... and the Lunaumbra Gourd in the box will subdue the heliobus.

t_ch: 完美。
t_en: Perfect.

t_ch: 「降魔机巧鸟」运行稳定。
t_en: The exorcist cycrane is running smoothly.

t_ch: 做得好，还剩一处了。
t_en: Good job. Now, we're left with one place.

t_ch: 不错，操作越发熟练了。
t_en: Not bad. You're getting better at this.

t_ch: 总感觉这里面没有尾巴，也没有尾巴的碎片……
t_en: I don't sense Tail here, and there aren't any Tail fragment...

t_ch: 那个岁阳是不是不太对劲？它看起来…好凶。
t_en: Is that heliobus acting weird? It seems... fierce.

t_ch: {M#小子}{F#丫头}，有种就追上我啊。
t_en: Catch me if you can, {M#kiddo}{F#kiddo}.

t_ch: 怎么回事？它怎么一下子跑到那里了？
t_en: What's going on? How did it get there all of a sudden?

t_ch: 就这也想抓到我？吃屁去吧！
t_en: And you think you can catch me with those pathetic skills? Eat dirt!

t_ch: 这只岁阳好嚣张。
t_en: What an conceited heliobus.

t_ch: 还不够快，{M#小子}{F#丫头}。
t_en: You're not fast enough, {M#boy}{F#girl}.

t_ch: 要是尾巴还在的话……
t_en: If only we had Tail...

t_ch: 总算来了？好戏还没结束呢！
t_en: Finally? But it's not over yet!

t_ch: 你们连忙赶到了三月七身边。
t_en: You rush to March 7th's side.

t_ch: 接下来，应该只差最后一处了。
t_en: There should only be one location left.

t_ch: 哎？是我眼花了吗…刚才这里应该是有岁阳的吧？
t_en: Eh? Am I seeing things... There should have been heliobi there, right?

t_ch: …我们快去看看！
t_en: ...Let's go quickly and take a look!

t_ch: 借助降魔机巧鸟，不消一刻，你们便收伏了大部分逸散岁阳。
t_en: With the help of the exorcist cycrane, you subdued most of the unruly heliobi in less than ten minutes.

t_ch: 那里是不是有一个人？
t_en: Is someone there?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你看到那条新消息了吗？我询问了发帖人，她说她认得你。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, have you seen that post? I talked to the OP, and she claimed that she knew you.

t_ch: 三月七？
t_en: March 7th?

t_ch: 她遇到了灵异事件？
t_en: She had a paranormal encounter?

t_ch: 也就是说，这次的求助者是熟悉的人？
t_en: Does that mean the requester is someone you know?

t_ch: 是啊，这位三月七姑娘可是列车无名客的一员，{NICKNAME}的重要伙伴。
t_en: Yes, Miss March 7th is a member of the Express' Nameless and {NICKNAME}'s important companion.

t_ch: 说起来，上次我们在她附近看见了一只岁阳，结果突然消失了...会不会和这件事有联系。
t_en: Come to think of it, we saw a heliobus wandering around her the last time, and it suddenly disappeared... Could it be related to this event?

t_ch: 咱们在这里瞎猜也起不到什么作用。既然求助者是列车组的人，这件事就交给{NICKNAME}去办吧。
t_en: No point in making wild guesses here. Since the requester is a member of the Crew, we'll leave this matter to you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 交给我银河球棒侠吧。
t_en: Leave it to the Galactic Baseballer.

t_ch: 累活都交给我是吧。
t_en: Giving all the tough work to me, huh?

t_ch: 哎，这不是相信你嘛。再说了，你和她交情那么深，总比我们出面方便一些。
t_en: Hey, I put all my trust in you. Moreover, you know the requester well, so it's easier for you to handle it.

t_ch: 和三月七姑娘打交道…是个累活？
t_en: Is interacting with Miss March 7th... a tiresome job?

t_ch: 不应该吧，只是{NICKNAME}在开玩笑而已。
t_en: It shouldn't be. I believe {NICKNAME} was only kidding.

t_ch: 那…请你拿上这个符箓。只要把它贴在身上，就能查清一个人到底有没有岁阳附体了。
t_en: Here... take this talisman with you. Place it on the suspect and you'll know if that person has been possessed by the heliobus.

t_ch: 藏月瓠…藏月瓠的数量不多。就麻烦{NICKNAME}用这个我改造过的鸟笼暂时拘束它，之后再带到镇妖塔降服。
t_en: As for the Lunaumbra Gourds... we don't have many left now. Please use this modified birdcage to imprison it temporarily and bring it to the suppression tower to subdue it, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 藿藿准备了这么多东西…总觉得这次好像很简陋的样子。
t_en: Huohuo sure did a lot of prep-work... but things seem a little sketchy this time.

t_ch: 好用就成，等你的好消息{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Whatever works. We'll wait for your good news, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: （把符箓贴在她身上）
t_en: (Paste the talisman on her.)

t_ch: 符箓静静地挂在姬子的衣服表面，没有任何反应。
t_en: The talisman quietly stays on Himeko's clothes. It doesn't have any reaction.

t_ch: 看来姬子姐没有问题——我早就知道。
t_en: It seems like Himeko is fine, just as I suspected.

t_ch: 这是什么从仙舟带回来的小玩具吗？
t_en: Did you bring this toy from the Xianzhou?

t_ch: 没事啦，姬子姐。
t_en: It's nothing, Himeko.

t_ch: （把符箓贴在他身上）
t_en: (Paste the talisman on him.)

t_ch: 符箓静静地挂在瓦尔特的外套上。
t_en: The talisman quietly stays on Welt's coat.

t_ch: 没有反应啊，看来问题也不在杨叔身上。
t_en: No reaction. It seems like Mr. Yang doesn't have any problems either.

t_ch: 怎么了，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: What is it, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 将三月七的求助告知了瓦尔特。
t_en: You tell Welt about March 7th's request.

t_ch: 这样么…最近我在列车倒是没有发现什么怪事，或许问题并不出在车组成员身上。
t_en: I see... I didn't discover any strange occurrences on the Express recently. Maybe the problem doesn't lie with the members.

t_ch: 当然，这只是我无端的猜测，你们还是按计划继续调查为好。
t_en: Of course, that's just my unfounded speculation. You should continue your investigation.

t_ch: 知道啦，谢谢杨叔！
t_en: Got it. Thanks, Mr. Yang!

t_ch: （把符箓贴在它身上）
t_en: (Paste the talisman on it.)

t_ch: 符箓静静地贴在帕姆身体表面…粘掉了几根毛。
t_en: The talisman quietly stays on Pom-Pom... and takes a few hairs of their body off with it.

t_ch: 哇，三月七乘客你在做什么？
t_en: Woah! What are you doing, March 7th?

t_ch: 啊哈哈…这是我跟{NICKNAME}做的一个小测试，恭喜列车长，你合格啦！
t_en: Oh haha... I'm doing a small test with {NICKNAME}. Congratulations, Pom-Pom! You've passed the test!

t_ch: 不要随便拿列车长开玩笑啊帕！
t_en: Don't you treat your conductor like a fool!

t_ch: 不应该啊，列车上的大家都很正常，那岁阳究竟藏在哪儿呢？
t_en: This shouldn't be the case. Everyone on the Express is normal. Where could the heliobus be hiding?

t_ch: 总感觉问题在你身上…
t_en: Perhaps the problem lies with you...

t_ch: 我？怎么会？你们上次不是都给我测过了嘛…
t_en: Me? How can it be? Didn't you test me the last time?

t_ch: 罢了罢了，你再过来贴我一次试试看。
t_en: Forget it. Come and slap it on me again.

t_ch: 你仔细检查着三月七身上的每一个角落。终于，符箓发出了光芒，源头是——三月七的相机。
t_en: You carefully check March 7th's entire person. Finally, the talisman begins to glow. The source of the problem lies with... March 7th's camera.

t_ch: 居然…还真有啊。
t_en: I can't believe... it's really me.

t_ch: 它就是那天逃走的碎片。
t_en: It is one of the fragments that escaped the other day.

t_ch: 哦，怪不得之前符箓贴在我身上没反应，原来这家伙藏进了我的宝贝相机里——真狡猾！
t_en: Oh, no wonder the talisman doesn't react when it's on me. It turns out that the heliobus was hidden in my precious camera! Dastardly!

t_ch: 呵，没想到被你们识破了，既然如此……
t_en: Ha, I didn't expect you to find me. If that's the case...

t_ch: 不好，它要动手了！
t_en: Oh no. It's attacking!

t_ch: 请、请放过我！
t_en: P—Please spare my life!

t_ch: 岁阳这么怂的吗？
t_en: Are all heliobi such wimps?

t_ch: 总之，你先把它找个地方关起来吧，可别又附到什么东西上去了。
t_en: In any case, you should imprison it somewhere. Don't let it possess anything else again.

t_ch: 呜呜呜，没想到我才出现没多久，又要被封印回去了……
t_en: *sob* I just escaped not long ago, and now I'm going to be sealed again...

t_ch: 明明我还有那么多事情没做，那么多美丽的景色没看……
t_en: There's still so much I haven't done... so many sights I haven't seen...

t_ch: 你为什么藏在相机里？
t_en: What were you doing in the camera?

t_ch: 不知哪个大东西把我分裂了出来……
t_en: I don't know what fragmented me...

t_ch: 我，第一次感觉到自己时，我被关在黑暗里。我从没见过外面的样子，听大家伙们说起，我想看看！
t_en: The first time I was aware of myself was when I was locked up in a dark place. I had not seen the outside world. But hearing the others talking about it aroused my curiosity!

t_ch: 没想到你的小盒子里藏着这么多美妙的画片，我一不留神就看呆了。
t_en: I didn't know your little box had so many beautiful pictures, so I got distracted looking at them.

t_ch: 我想，寄宿到这个盒子里，也许不错？借这个机会，也可以把那些风景看个够。
t_en: Then I thought perhaps possessing this box was a good idea. I can take the chance to see all the beautiful scenery.

t_ch: 唔，听起来有一丢丢可怜啊。
t_en: Hmm, you sound pitiful.

t_ch: 你为什么找上三月？
t_en: Why did you look for March?

t_ch: 我从来没想过要吸干人类什么的，我只是…被她身上的那股气息吸引，忍不住就去接近了。
t_en: I've never thought of draining a human. I was just... attracted by her vibe. I couldn't help but get closer to her.

t_ch: 咱们岁阳开始也和她一样纯净、洁白，就像静静燃烧的火焰。我想，或许就是这样才会被她吸引的吧。
t_en: We heliobi were born as pure and innocent as her, like a quiet burning flame. I guess, maybe that's why I was attracted by her.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，什么时候你也能这么夸夸我？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, when are you gonna praise me like this?

t_ch: 你觉得我该如何处置你？
t_en: What do you think I should do with you?

t_ch: 在我也无法想起的远古时代，岁阳一族的先祖满宇宙地漂荡，也没什么心思啊、烦恼啊什么的…我觉得那样就挺好。
t_en: In ancient times, beyond my memory, the ancestral heliobi wandered around the universe without any intention or worries... And I think that was pretty good.

t_ch: 我也打算效仿先祖，离开仙舟、重归宇宙，过上逍遥自在的生活。那些以人类心思为食的家伙，我跟它们合不来。
t_en: I intend to follow my ancestor's example — leave the Xianzhou, rejoin the universe, and live a life of freedom. I don't get along well with the heliobi that feed on humans' emotions.

t_ch: …我知道这个愿望很难实现。所以，不管你打算如何处置我，都请先让我见识一下那些照片中的景色。
t_en: ...I know it's hard to fulfill this wish. So, no matter what you plan to do with me, please allow me to see the scenery in those photos first.

t_ch: 带着遗憾被封印的话，我就再也燃不起来啦！
t_en: If I'm sealed with my regrets, I won't be able to burn brightly anymore!

t_ch: 三月，你怎么看？
t_en: March, what do you think?

t_ch: 嗯…听你的介绍，岁阳附身会对宿主产生不小的危害。但我到现在什么感觉也没有，说明它确实没做过坏事。
t_en: Hmm... You mentioned before that a heliobus' possession will do a lot of harm to the host. However, I haven't felt anything so far, which means it hasn't done any harm to me.

t_ch: 而且它这么欣赏我的照片，怎么可能是坏人呢！？
t_en: And since it appreciates my photos, how can it be bad!?

t_ch: 所以…满足一下它的愿望，也不是不可以啦。正好我还打算再去罗浮一趟，拍些照片，逛吃逛吃，就带上它一块儿呗。
t_en: So... I don't see what's wrong with fulfilling its wish. Coincidentally, I plan to walk around the Luofu again to take more pictures, shopping, and enjoy the delicacies. I'll bring it with me then.

t_ch: 走，逛吃逛吃！
t_en: Let's go. Time to shop and eat!

t_ch: 你就知道吃…
t_en: All you know is to eat...

t_ch: 可以，但我要陪同。
t_en: Sure, but I'll accompany you.

t_ch: 谢谢…果然世上还是好人多啊。
t_en: Thank you... There are still many kind people in the world.

t_ch: 我们到啦~
t_en: Here we are~

t_ch: 这边的水里偶尔会出现龙的影子，我第一次见时也吃了一惊呢。
t_en: Occasionally, dragons appear in the water here. I was surprised when I first saw them.

t_ch: 其实，另一边也有。
t_en: There're also dragons on the other side.

t_ch: 哎，会吗？我怎么从来没有发现过。
t_en: Oh, really? Why haven't I noticed it?

t_ch: 如此巨大的水幕…感觉要是不小心飞进去会被浇灭呢……
t_en: What a gigantic water curtain... It feels like I'll be put out instantly if I accidentally fall into it...

t_ch: 岁阳的火焰…应该不怕水吧？
t_en: Can the flame of a heliobus... be extinguished by water?

t_ch: 你可不要在脑袋里冒出好奇的情绪啊！这种事情不能试！试试会逝世……
t_en: Please don't even think of such thing! You can't risk it! Curiosity kills the heliobus...

t_ch: 唉，好吧。
t_en: *sigh* ...All right.

t_ch: 说起这分开的海水啊，是咱们列车上某位兄弟动用了隐藏力量才变成这样的。很厉害吧。
t_en: Speaking of these parted waters, this was actually done by a member of the Crew when he used his hidden power. Amazing, isn't it?

t_ch: 喔喔，如此强大的力量。他、他是何方神圣？
t_en: Wow, he is so powerful! Wh—Who is he?

t_ch: 他是个持明族。呃，你要是问我什么是持明…我就答不上来了，我不擅长科普。但我可以带你去看看他小时候的样子。
t_en: He's a Vidyadhara. Uhh, as for the question of what a Vidyadhara is... Sorry, I can't answer that. I'm not good at explaining things, but I can show you what he looked like when he was little.

t_ch: 你看，这些就是持明族小宝宝时的样子。
t_en: Look, this is what Vidyadhara babies look like.

t_ch: 不过，他们活的时间久了也会变回这样，必须在蛋里休息一段时间后才能出来。所以我也不知道持明的蛋究竟算年轻呢还是老呢。
t_en: But if they live for a long time, they will return to this form. Hence, they need to rest in the egg for a period before coming out again. I'm not sure whether to consider a Vidyadhara egg as young or old.

t_ch: 从如此弱小，变得那样强大…生命，很奇妙啊。
t_en: From something so frail to a being so strong... Life is indeed a wonderful thing.

t_ch: 既然如此…你们是如何掌控那位持明，让他为你们动用这股力量的？
t_en: If that's the case... how did you and the rest control the Vidyadhara and make him use his power for the Express crew?

t_ch: 掌控？不不，他是我们的朋友。朋友是互相帮助的，朋友也不会想着让对方做他不愿做的事情。
t_en: Control? No, he's our friend. Friends are there to help one another and will not force each other to do things they are unwilling to do.

t_ch: 朋友…我，我不懂。但我明白你的意思。
t_en: Friends... I—I don't understand... but I strangely know what you mean.

t_ch: 走吧，去下一处景点——建木玄根。
t_en: Let's go to our next stop — Roots of the Arbor.

t_ch: 一副快要变成肉棺材的下等躯壳……
t_en: An inferior shell on the verge of becoming a flesh-coffin...

t_ch: 这脑袋里倒是装着许多情绪。可惜，可惜，一点儿快乐都榨不出来了。只有苦涩的仇恨、还有失落感…唉，没有品尝的价值了。
t_en: This brain contains numerous emotions. But what a pity. There isn't any happiness left in it. There's only bitter hatred and the feeling of disappointment... *sigh* There's no value in tasting it.

t_ch: 呃呃呃呃呃……
t_en: Ughhhh...

t_ch: 顺着人类的念头飞到这儿来，原本以为能尝到些什么，平息我的渴望……
t_en: Following the trails of human thought, I was hoping to taste some flavor to quell my hunger...

t_ch: 你在干什么？
t_en: What are you doing?

t_ch: 又有一只漏网岁阳！
t_en: Another escaped heliobus!

t_ch: 喂，那边的小东西，这两人是你的棋子吗？分我一个如何？!
t_en: Hey, little fellow. Are these two your pawns? How about giving one of them to me!?

t_ch: 你要做什么？请不要伤害我的朋友。
t_en: What do you want? Please do not hurt my friends.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，朋友？岁阳竟然会把人类当成朋友？哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Hahaha, your friends? A heliobus treating humans as friends? Hahahahaha!

t_ch: 放心，我会先吞下你，再接收你送上门的这两份大礼。
t_en: Don't worry. I will swallow you first before accepting your gifts.

t_ch: 来点作用吧，肉棺材——
t_en: Come on, make yourself useful, flesh-coffin —

t_ch: 唔…呃呃呃呃呃！
t_en: Uhh.... ughhhhh!

t_ch: 好顽强的战斗意志，又冷又硬。
t_en: What a tenacious will for battle! Cold and resolute.

t_ch: 无趣的人类！我倒了大霉寄宿在魔阴身里，结果又撞上你们这样的悍匪。
t_en: Dull humans! I'm unlucky enough to possess a mara-stuck body, and now, I encounter vicious bandits like you!

t_ch: 妖孽，你可识得此物？
t_en: Vile ghost, do you recognize this item?

t_ch: 废话少说，进来吧你！
t_en: Shut up and go in!

t_ch: 唔啊啊啊啊啊！
t_en: Ughhhhhhh!

t_ch: 我…我被关在黑暗里的时候，和同族有过交流。从它们的震动里，我看到过它们操纵过的人类的样子、经历。
t_en: When... when I was locked in a dark space, I interacted with my kind. From their actions, I've seen the way and experiences they had when manipulating humans.

t_ch: 它们吸收了那些人类的情绪、被人性沾染，变得狡猾、变得贪婪、变得凶残了。
t_en: They absorbed the emotions of the humans and were influenced by their humanity. They became cunning, greedy, and ferocious.

t_ch: 它们…被人类的念头吸引，却又变得比人类更糟了。我不想，像它们那样……
t_en: They... were attracted by humans' thoughts but became worse than the humans. I don't want... to be like them...

t_ch: 小宝烛，还记得你说过的「朋友」吗？
t_en: Little Arkeri, do you still remember you called us "friends"?

t_ch: 人并不是只有那些负面情绪的。人，很复杂。我有时候也会丧气，也会厌烦，也会想要狠狠敲打某些坏东西。
t_en: Humans do not only have these negative emotions. Humans are, in fact, very complicated. Sometimes, I feel depressed or frustrated, too. And I'll want to smash and destroy the things around me.

t_ch: 但是每当回到列车上，和姬子姐还有杨叔说说话，逗逗丹恒，拉着{NICKNAME}一起看车窗外的星星，我就觉得……
t_en: But whenever I return to the Express to chat with Himeko and Mr. Yang, tease Dan Heng, or get {NICKNAME} to watch the stars from the train windows with me, I feel...

t_ch: …很快乐？
t_en: ...Very happy?

t_ch: 不，很平静。就像一颗星星，在天空中它该在的位置那样…平静，自然。
t_en: No, I feel at peace. Like a star in the sky, it stays where it belongs and exists as itself peacefully.

t_ch: 我，说不出来这是怎样的一种感受。我们人类，不知为什么拥有了思考的能力，拥有了许多烦恼和痛苦，可我们也能享受到这样的平静。我想，这是宇宙对我们的祝福吧？
t_en: I can't describe that kind of feeling with words. We humans somehow have the ability to think, to possess a lot of worries and pain, but at the same time, we can also enjoy moments of peace like this one. I guess it's a blessing for us from the universe, isn't it?

t_ch: 我，不明白…但我品尝到了，三月这一刻的感觉。
t_en: I don't understand... but I can taste your feelings at this moment, March.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，有时候朋友之间不用说太多话，一个眼神秒懂。看来咱们真是有朋友的缘分啊。
t_en: Hehe, that's what it means to be friends. There's no need for many words, and you can understand me instantly with a look. It seems like we are fated to be friends!

t_ch: 来，{NICKNAME}，给咱们拍张照，当是这次远足的纪念吧。
t_en: Come, {NICKNAME}. Help us take a picture to commemorate our trip today.

t_ch: 咦，你的拍照技术越来越熟练啦。不愧是我的御用摄影师~
t_en: Hey, your photography skills are improving. No wonder I have you acting as my personal photographer~

t_ch: 时候不早了。谢谢你，三月。我，该回笼子里了。
t_en: It's getting late. Thank you, March. I... should return to the cage now.

t_ch: 岁阳，对你们人类很危险，对吧？所以我，还是回到黑暗里再睡一阵了。
t_en: Heliobi are very dangerous to humans, aren't they? I guess it's better for me to rest in the dark.

t_ch: 这真的是宝烛的想法吗？
t_en: Is that really what you think, Arkeri?

t_ch: 真实的想法……
t_en: What I really think...

t_ch: 我想，去往天外。我不知道，未来会怎样，但我也想体验三月说的平静。
t_en: I want to go beyond the sky. I don't know how the future will be like, but I'm also keen to experience that peacefulness you mentioned, March.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你怎么说？
t_en: What do you think, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 抱歉，公事公办。
t_en: I'm sorry. I need to follow the rules.

t_ch: 唔，也是呢…毕竟你是带着这项任务来的嘛。
t_en: Uh, that's true... After all, you came here for this mission.

t_ch: 不过…这只岁阳说过自己想要离开仙舟。看在它没做过什么坏事的份上，多少考虑一下？
t_en: But... the heliobus said it wants to leave the Xianzhou. Seeing that it didn't cause any harm, perhaps we can consider its suggestion?

t_ch: 我想把它放归天外。
t_en: I want to release it somewhere among the stars.

t_ch: 嗯，我也挺想让它去冒险的。毕竟都是「开拓」之路上的同伴嘛。
t_en: Yes, I want to let it go on an adventure, too. We're all companions trying to "Trailblaze" our own paths, right?

t_ch: 不过十王司那边…可能需要你解释一下。这小家伙也没做过什么坏事。
t_en: But with regard to the Ten-Lords Commission... you probably need to give them an explanation. And besides, this little guy didn't cause any harm.

t_ch: 我…还没想好，你说呢？
t_en: I... haven't thought of it. What do you think?

t_ch: 小家伙说的没错，它不能再大摇大摆地待在仙舟上了。
t_en: This little fellow is right. It can no longer strut around on the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 但我还是想将它放归宇宙，毕竟它的族类是从那儿来的。
t_en: But I still wish to release it into the universe. After all, its kind's from there.

t_ch: 我先回列车，你想好了就来和我说一声！
t_en: I'll return to the Express for now. Let me know once you've made your decision!

t_ch: 咦，你的拍照技术越来越熟练啦。不愧是我的御用摄影师~
t_en: Hey, your photography skills are improving. No wonder I have you acting as my personal photographer~

t_ch: 时候不早了。谢谢你，三月。我，该回笼子里了。
t_en: It's getting late. Thank you, March. I... should return to the cage now.

t_ch: 岁阳，对你们人类很危险，对吧？所以我，还是回到黑暗里再睡一阵了。
t_en: Heliobi are very dangerous to humans, aren't they? I guess it's better for me to rest in the dark.

t_ch: 这真的是宝烛的想法吗？
t_en: Is that really what you think, Arkeri?

t_ch: 真实的想法……
t_en: What I really think...

t_ch: 我想，去往天外。我不知道，未来会怎样，但我也想体验三月说的平静。
t_en: I want to go beyond the sky. I don't know how the future will be like, but I'm also keen to experience that peacefulness you mentioned, March.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你怎么说？
t_en: What do you think, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 抱歉，公事公办。
t_en: I'm sorry. I need to follow the rules.

t_ch: 唔，也是呢…毕竟你是带着这项任务来的嘛。
t_en: Uh, that's true... After all, you came here for this mission.

t_ch: 不过…这只岁阳说过自己想要离开仙舟。看在它没做过什么坏事的份上，多少考虑一下？
t_en: But... the heliobus said it wants to leave the Xianzhou. Seeing that it didn't cause any harm, perhaps we can consider its suggestion?

t_ch: 我想把它放归天外。
t_en: I want to release it somewhere among the stars.

t_ch: 嗯，我也挺想让它去冒险的。毕竟都是「开拓」之路上的同伴嘛。
t_en: Yes, I want to let it go on an adventure, too. We're all companions trying to "Trailblaze" our own paths, right?

t_ch: 不过十王司那边…可能需要你解释一下。这小家伙也没做过什么坏事。
t_en: But with regard to the Ten-Lords Commission... you probably need to give them an explanation. And besides, this little guy didn't cause any harm.

t_ch: 我…还没想好，你说呢？
t_en: I... haven't thought of it. What do you think?

t_ch: 小家伙说的没错，它不能再大摇大摆地待在仙舟上了。
t_en: This little fellow is right. It can no longer strut around on the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 但我还是想将它放归宇宙，毕竟它的族类是从那儿来的。
t_en: But I still wish to release it into the universe. After all, its kind's from there.

t_ch: 我先回列车，你想好了就来和我说一声！如果你打算把它带给判官，封印起来…就不用特意告诉我啦。
t_en: I'll return to the Express now. Let me know what's your decision! But if you wish to bring it to the Judges and seal it... spare me the details.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你可算来了！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're finally back!

t_ch: 发生甚么事了？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 上次跟你和藿藿分别后，我回到列车翻看自己拍出来的照片，你猜发生了什么？
t_en: After bidding goodbyes to you and Huohuo that day, I returned to the Express to look at my photographs, and guess what?

t_ch: 所有，所~有的漂亮照片上都多出了一个奇怪的影子，好可怕的。
t_en: All my beautiful photos — and I do mean all — have these new and weird shadows inside them. It's so scary.

t_ch: 你说，这列车上是不是有些不干净的东西？我该怎么办啊……
t_en: Say, do you think this Express is haunted? What should I do...

t_ch: 把捉鬼小队和符箓的事一五一十讲给了三月七。
t_en: You explain to March 7th about the ghost-hunting squad and the talisman.

t_ch: 哦…也就是说，这个符箓和之前贴在我身上的是同一种。
t_en: Oh... In other words, this talisman is the same as the one you pasted on me previously.

t_ch: 感觉是个不错的主意——用它把列车组都排查一遍的话， 就能找出那个被岁阳附体的家伙啦。
t_en: That sounds like a great idea. We can use it to check every member of the Crew, and we will be able to find the one possessed by the heliobus in no time.

t_ch: 我们出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 好耶！就像查案一样。
t_en: Great! Sounds like we're investigating a case.

t_ch: 你就站在此地，不要走动。
t_en: Stay here and don't wander around.

t_ch: 哎？别一个人单干啊，这次我也要来！
t_en: Huh? Don't fly solo. Count me in too!

t_ch: 那你去拍几张照片回来。
t_en: You can take some pictures there and come back.

t_ch: 唔…你就是想找个理由把我打发走吧。不行，这次我也要来！
t_en: Ugh... You're trying to get rid of me. No way, this time, I'm coming too!

t_ch: 放心，我可有经验了，藿藿贴的时候我都看了个清楚。这次我也要试试给别人贴符的感觉。
t_en: Don't worry. I'm experienced. When Huohuo placed it on me, I observed how she did it. This time, I want to try placing a talisman on someone else.

t_ch: 真广阔呀！
t_en: This place is so big!

t_ch: 嗯，这儿可是仙舟上最棒的景色了。
t_en: Yeah, this place has the best view on the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 就让我来当小火苗的导游吧。
t_en: Let me be your guide today, little ember.

t_ch: 唔，这里发生的事情还历历在目。
t_en: Hmm, what happened here is still fresh in my mind.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你准备好拿它怎么办了吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, have you decided on what to do with them?

t_ch: 我完全相信你{NICKNAME}，你的选择就是我的选择。
t_en: I fully trust you, {NICKNAME}. Your choice shall be my choice.

t_ch: 把它放归宇宙吧。
t_en: Release them back to outer space.

t_ch: 嗯！那我们这就行动吧。
t_en: Great! Let's get to it then.

t_ch: 我明白了——我来自天外，我将回到天外。
t_en: I understand... As I hail from the void beyond, I shall return to it.

t_ch: 这一趟旅程我很满足，感谢你，三月七…也感谢你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I am very satisfied in this journey. Thank you, March 7th... You as well, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我得遵守仙舟的规矩…
t_en: I shall obey the laws of the Xianzhou...

t_ch: 嗯…去做你该做的事吧。
t_en: Well... do what you need to.

t_ch: 好神奇，明明我们即将永别，我却再次品尝到了…平静的感觉？
t_en: It's so strange. Even as we are about to part forever, I'm once again experiencing... a sense of peace?

t_ch: 去履行你的职责吧，我也该回到黑暗里再睡一阵了。
t_en: Carry out your duty, then. I shall return to slumber in the darkness for a while longer.

t_ch: 我再想想。
t_en: Let me think about it.

t_ch: 小家伙，是该离开的时候了——
t_en: Little buddy, it's time to leave~

t_ch: 三月七关闭了鸟笼的禁制，但宝烛并没有就此离去。
t_en: March 7th lifts the constraints of the birdcage, but Arkeri doesn't leave immediately.

t_ch: 以人类习惯的方式道别吧。再见了，三月，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I wish to say our farewells as humans do. Farewell, March, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 祝你们能永享那份平静。
t_en: I wish you will forever cherish that peace.

t_ch: 于是它穿过笼壁，穿过车窗，飘向了更为广阔的外层空间。那里没有欺骗，没有纷争——至少从它诞生至今的大部分时间和空间中，没有。
t_en: So they pass through the cage's walls, through the train's window, and float into the spacious outer space. In that place, there are no deceits, no conflicts – at least, in most of the space-time spectrum since its creation.

t_ch: 再见。你们的生命尺度与时间观念截然不同，尽管一时相会，但你明白……
t_en: Farewell. Your duration of life and sense of time are entirely different, and though you only met briefly, you understand that...

t_ch: 你们不会再见了。
t_en: ...you will never meet again.

t_ch: 我知道{NICKNAME}为什么要坚持将宝烛带回镇妖塔。
t_en: I know now why {NICKNAME} is so insistent on bringing Arkeri to the suppression tower.

t_ch: 你总是能做出正确的选择，并且不后悔。
t_en: You can always make the right decision, and you never regret.

t_ch: …还是说，你也有后悔的时候？
t_en: ...or do you?

t_ch: 我既然选择了，就决定不后悔。
t_en: When I made the decision, I've also decided never to regret it.

t_ch: 咱得向你学习……
t_en: I should learn from you...

t_ch: 我深思熟虑，但偶尔也会后悔。
t_en: I make decisions after lots of consideration, but I still regret some choices...

t_ch: 原来是这样吗……
t_en: Is that so...

t_ch: 宝烛充分相信你的决定，我也相信，你去做该做的事吧。
t_en: Arkeri fully trusts your choice, and so do I. So, go do whatever you need to do.

t_ch: （该回绥园的镇妖塔了。）
t_en: (It's time to go back to the suppression towers in Fyxestroll Garden.)

t_ch: 别忘了我们的老规矩，桂小姐让我提醒你发帖…拜托你了。
t_en: Don't forget our routine. Miss Gui asked me to remind you to make the post... Please.

t_ch: 交给我吧。
t_en: Leave it to me.

t_ch: 我懂的，要涨粉嘛！
t_en: I know. Time to get more fans!

t_ch: 其实，我自己拍照的时候…照片上也拍出过鬼影……
t_en: Actually, there was once when I was taking a photo... the picture also showed a ghostly figure...

t_ch: 我没有敢跟别人说，自己悄悄地删除之后，提心吊胆了很久。
t_en: I didn't dare to tell anyone, so I deleted it and was paranoid for a long time.

t_ch: 如果照片上的鬼影，都是这么可爱无害的话就好了。哎……
t_en: If the ghostly figures on the photos are all as cute and as harmless as this one, it'll be great. But...

t_ch: 辛苦了，回见……
t_en: Thank you for your hard work. See you later...

t_ch: 虽然相识短暂，总感觉我和宝烛有些缘分，希望有一天能再相见吧。
t_en: Though our meeting was brief, I somehow feel a connection with Arkeri. I hope that one day we'll meet again.

t_ch: 咱会在这里待一会，你去忙自己的事吧。
t_en: I'll stay here for a bit. You go do what you need to do.

t_ch: 人都到了呀，那我就开始了！咳咳！
t_en: Is everyone here? Then I'll begin! Ahem!

t_ch: 全体目光向我看齐，宣布个事——
t_en: If everyone could please turn their eyes toward me, I've an announcement to make:

t_ch: 上次听到这种话还是云骑训练的时候……
t_en: The last time I heard this kind of talk was back during the Cloud Knights' basic training...

t_ch: 是这样的，最近我收到了一个包裹，打开一看，里面是罗浮杂俎网站寄来的「订阅奖励银牌纪念」。
t_en: Basically, I got a parcel recently. And when I opened it, there was a Silver Subscription Commemorative Medallion from the Ghostly Grove website.

t_ch: 简单来说就是订阅数量达到十万，就会收到这么一个银色奖牌。
t_en: Basically, if you get a hundred thousand subscribers, then you will get this silver medallion.

t_ch: 在银牌之上就只有一个订阅量百万才会发的金色奖牌，所以啊，银牌的含金量还是挺高的。
t_en: After the silver one comes a gold medallion for a million subscribers, so the silver medallion is quite valuable indeed.

t_ch: 话又说回来了，前段时间我们准备了那么多优质内容，在大家的努力下，账号的粉丝量涨得飞快。要我说这都是大家的功劳嘛，所以我才把大家喊过来——
t_en: To put it another way, we've all put out so much high-quality content that our fanbase for the account has been rapidly increasing. If you ask me, this is thanks to everyone's efforts, and so that's why I've called everyone over...

t_ch: 恭喜！蹭蹭喜气！
t_en: Congratulations! How delightful!

t_ch: 同喜同喜！
t_en: Same to you!

t_ch: 我也蹭蹭！
t_en: Me too!

t_ch: 除了奖牌外，有没有实际点的？
t_en: Besides the medallions, is there any practical value?

t_ch: 没啦！你也知道，罗浮杂俎不过是个灵异见闻类主题的小网站。发过来的银牌也不是真的用银子打的呢。
t_en: Nope! As you know, the Ghostly Grove is a small paranormal-themed website. The silver medallions dished out aren't even made out of real silver.

t_ch: 这种事的确值得庆祝一下，要不去金人巷吃一顿？
t_en: This really is a cause for celebration. How about we go to the Aurum Alley for a meal?

t_ch: 把大家喊过来，是因为我觉得这个奖牌我们都有份。
t_en: I've called everyone over because I think we each have an equal share in this medallion.

t_ch: 我们每个人都是小队里不可或缺的一份子，没有各位的帮忙，哪会有这么吸引眼球的节目效果呀。
t_en: Each one of us forms an indispensable part of the squad. Without everyone chipping in, there'd never be such a flashy program.

t_ch: 正因如此，我想把这个奖牌…「送给」大家。
t_en: That's why, I want to "give" this medallion... to everyone.

t_ch: 就一块奖牌，你还是自己收着吧。
t_en: It's just one medallion. Hold onto it yourself.

t_ch: 你想怎么「送」？
t_en: How are you going to "give" it away?

t_ch: 你自己收着吧。
t_en: You hold onto it.

t_ch: 裳裳说得对，这牌子只有一块，分也不好分。而且这个成绩也离不开粉丝的支持……
t_en: Shangshang's right. There's only one of these and it can't be split up. And anyway, this achievement is also impossible without our fanbase supporting us...

t_ch: 所以我想来想去——我决定，在罗浮杂俎的个人账号上录个视频，发表下获奖感言。还有就是…收集下粉丝的提问，做个答疑环节，算是对粉丝们的回馈！
t_en: So after racking my brains — I've decided to upload a video to my personal account on the Ghostly Grove as an acceptance speech. And also... do an ask-me-anything segment with fans so I can give a little something back!

t_ch: 希望{NICKNAME}也能来帮忙，你点子多，见识广，正好帮我来选选提问，录制下视频什么的——你也要跟我一起出镜！
t_en: I hope {NICKNAME} can help out too, as you have lots of ideas and general knowledge. You can help me choose questions, record video content and stuff... like being on camera together with me!

t_ch: 我社恐，能拒绝吗？
t_en: I get social anxiety. Is it cool if I don't?

t_ch: 不行不行！大家都要露面，你要是不答应，我就提着镜头怼在你额头上来个大特写！
t_en: No no no! Everyone has to show their face. If you don't agree, then I'm definitely going to single you out and shoot an extreme close-up of just your forehead!

t_ch: 好呀，特写镜头多来几个！
t_en: Fine. The more close-ups the better!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，好说好说！
t_en: Heehee, no problem!

t_ch: 就这么决定啦！
t_en: That's it then!

t_ch: 大家还是先去忙自己的事吧，之后我再安排大家来录视频。至于「粉丝提问」的事，我等会儿就去征集，就拜托{NICKNAME}你看看有什么有趣的提问啦！
t_en: Everyone should finish up with their own stuff first. I'll arrange for you to shoot the video content later. As for the Fan Q&A segment, I'll collect those up in a bit. {NICKNAME}, can you please see if there are any interesting questions?

t_ch: 海量提问淹没了你，你差点迷失在时而风趣、时而刻薄、时而温馨、偶尔感人的虚拟社交中。
t_en: An avalanche of questions overwhelms you, and you almost get lost inside this social network that's sometimes witty, sometimes harsh, sometimes warm, and even sometimes touching.

t_ch: 你回过神来，依靠着自己超高的道德，以及这些日子相处下来对桂乃芬的了解，你不断翻看挑选着。
t_en: Coming back to your senses, you have come to rely on your own superior sense of morality. And based on your understanding of Guinaifen from these past few days, you keep flipping through the options.

t_ch: 眼看就到了征集截止的时间，桂乃芬约你前去拍摄提问环节的外景，出发前，你在脑海中选定了一些有意思的提问。
t_en: As the deadline for submitting questions approaches, Guinaifen asks you to shoot the location for the Q&A segment. You pick out a few interesting questions before you go.

t_ch: 我想想，干脆就去星槎海录视频吧？
t_en: Let me think. Why don't we just shoot over at Starskiff Haven?

t_ch: 出发！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 我先去找地方，你们一会赶紧来吧。
t_en: I'll go look for a place now. Come over soon.

t_ch: 你先去，我一会就来。
t_en: You go first and I'll catch up.

t_ch: 不见不散。
t_en: See you there.

t_ch: 你来啦！设备已经调试好啦，「粉丝提问」环节我自己收集了一部分提问，不过还是由你那边收集到的先开始吧。
t_en: You're here! The equipment has all been calibrated. I collected some questions myself for the Fan Q&A segment, but let's start with the ones you got instead.

t_ch: 我们俩这样一来一回有问有答，视频就没那么枯燥！
t_en: We'll go back and forth like this between you and me asking and answering questions, so the vlog doesn't seem so stale!

t_ch: 来来来，看镜头！
t_en: C'mon, look into the camera!

t_ch: 桂乃芬似乎已经按下了录制按钮……
t_en: Guinaifen seems to have already pressed the Record button...

t_ch: 别担心，放松点，随便说！这些视频我回去会一帧一帧剪好了再发出来。
t_en: Don't worry. Just relax and say whatever you like! I'll go back over these and edit out the good stuff before posting it up.

t_ch: 先从你的提问开始吧，你都收集了哪些问题呢？
t_en: Let's start with one of your questions. What did you get?

t_ch: 有粉丝提问…
t_en: A fan asked...

t_ch: 为什么要当主播？
t_en: Why did you become a vlogger?

t_ch: 因为…条件、时机都刚好，我既能在镜头前表演，又能和大家实时互动，挺热闹的，我也很喜欢，你们不觉得靠这个谋生挺酷吗？
t_en: Because... the timing and circumstances were just right. I can perform in front of a camera, and I get to interact with everyone in real-time, so it's exciting. And I like it! Don't you think it's kind of awesome to make a living like this?

t_ch: 我看到还有朋友问「以后还会直播吗」，会呀会呀，为什么不呢？
t_en: I see one friend here has asked, "Will you keep streaming in the future?" Sure, I sure will. Why not?

t_ch: 反正短期内我没有离开仙舟的计划啦，之后还是会坚持直播的。
t_en: Anyway, I don't plan on leaving the Xianzhou any time soon, and I'll keep on streaming in the future.

t_ch: 目前我也在筹备和规划未来的直播节目，可能会固定在某些时间段播吧，这样方便大家观看。敬请期待！
t_en: I'm preparing and planning out future live stream segments, which might be played at fixed times so it's easier for everyone to watch. Stay tuned!

t_ch: 主播仙舟话挺地道，怎么学的？
t_en: Your Xianzhou dialect is really fluent. Where did you learn it?

t_ch: 谢谢这位观众老爷的夸奖！简单来说就是抓住一切聊天的机会，使劲聊使劲练！
t_en: Thank you for the compliment, boss! In a nutshell, just seize every chance you get to talk. Talk and practice as much as you can!

t_ch: 我原本说话口音还蛮奇怪的，全靠我脸皮厚，逮着谁就使劲聊。
t_en: I used to have this weird accent when I talked. Everything's thanks to my thick skin, and chatting as much as possible with whomever I meet.

t_ch: 我以前坐星槎就喜欢聊天，和计程槎飞行士们聊着聊着就忘了时间，还好人家没多收我钱，嘿嘿！
t_en: I used to love chatting on the starskiff and I'd lose track of time while chatting with the pilots. Luckily they never charged me extra, teehee!

t_ch: 最喜欢仙舟上的什么？
t_en: What's your favorite thing about the Xianzhou culture?

t_ch: 美食！好吃的太多了！我个人比较喜欢金人巷那边的几家老字号，实惠又好吃！
t_en: The food! There's so much delicious food! I personally love a few revered old classics over on the Aurum Alley. They're both cheap, and delicious!

t_ch: 仙舟美食博大精深，少吃几顿我都觉得受不了，我感觉我这胃已经是地地道道的「仙舟胃」了。
t_en: The Xianzhou cuisine is so broad and deep that if I don't eat it for a few meals, I'll go nuts. This stomach of mine, I feel like it's already an authentic Xianzhou stomach.

t_ch: 直播内容是特效吗？
t_en: Do your vlogs use special effects?

t_ch: 才不是！我再再再再第不知道多少次在这里声明一遍——
t_en: No way! Let me state AGAAAAIN for who-knows-how-many-times now:

t_ch: 未成年请在家长的监护下观看，身体不好的也请慎重，一切都是真实直播，没有任何后期加工。
t_en: Minors, please view under parent supervision, and please be careful if you are in poor health. Everything is real and shot live without any editing in the post.

t_ch: 主播是在相当有实力的同伴保护下才敢直播的，他们个个身手了得，所以也请观众老爷们不要随意模仿，只身前往遇到危险了请及时向地衡司求助！
t_en: I only dare to live stream thanks to the protection of my mighty companions. They're all very skilled fighters, so we're asking you to not try this at home. Please seek assistance from the Realm-Keeping Commission if you head there yourself and encounter dangerous situations!

t_ch: 就这些了。
t_en: And that's all.

t_ch: 嗯好。
t_en: Whew, great.

t_ch: 我问完了。
t_en: I don't have any more questions.

t_ch: 呼——正好我停下来喝杯茶。
t_en: Whew — right on time for my tea break.

t_ch: 你那边的问完了是吧，来来来，我这里还有一些提问。是我特意为你收集的——
t_en: Have you finished with the questions over there? C'mon c'mon c'mon! I've got some questions with me here that I've collected up just for you...

t_ch: 咳咳，先听这个——
t_en: Ahem, here's this one:

t_ch: 「经常看到小桂子和高个灰头发的{F#大美女}{M#大帅哥}一起出镜，{F#她}{M#他}有对象了嘛？」
t_en: "I often see Little Gui together with this tall gray-haired hot {F#girl}{M#guy}. Is {F#she}{M#he} single?"

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你来给大家回应两句呗！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, why don't you say a few words for everyone!

t_ch: 我单身。
t_en: I'm single.

t_ch: 哇哦！不知道这位提问的观众老爷对这个答案是否满意呢！
t_en: Wow! I hope you're satisfied with the answer to that question there, boss!

t_ch: 呃，恋爱中。
t_en: Er, I'm taken.

t_ch: 真的假的！？啧啧，我已经闻到了恋爱的酸臭味啦！
t_en: Really!? Tsk tsk, I can smell the sour scent of love from here!

t_ch: 已离婚。
t_en: I'm divorced.

t_ch: 没看出来啊，年纪轻轻就已经经历了这么多情感沧桑……
t_en: I didn't realize that. Someone so young already experiencing all the trials and tribulations of love...

t_ch: 目前丧偶。
t_en: I'm widowed.
Huh!?

t_ch: 等等等等…你是在逗乐子吧？喂，不要胡言乱语啊，观众们会当真的！
t_en: Waaaaait a minute... are you punking me? Hey, don't mess around like that, or they will think you really mean it!

t_ch: 我还没成年呢，问这些不好吧！
t_en: I'm still a minor. You shouldn't be asking!

t_ch: 别看{NICKNAME}长得高，{F#她}{M#他}实际年龄还小着呢，观众老爷们还是问点能问的吧！
t_en: {NICKNAME} might be tall but {F#she}{M#he}'s still a youth. Come on, listeners. Let's ask some proper questions!

t_ch: 看来{NICKNAME}的观众缘还挺好的嘛，诶，{NICKNAME}你脸怎么这么红！
t_en: Looks like {NICKNAME} is quite popular with our fans. Hey, {NICKNAME}, why are you blushing?

t_ch: 谁脸红了，我没有！
t_en: Who's blushing? Not me!

t_ch: 活跃下节目效果卖卖人设而已，你别在意。
t_en: I'm just trying to make it more viral to sell the show. Don't worry about it.

t_ch: 这种问题是挺那个的…
t_en: This kind of question is really, y'know...

t_ch: 啊？你还真脸红了，嘿，还挺可爱的。
t_en: Huh? You really are blushing now. Ha, that's pretty cute.

t_ch: 是、是打光效果…
t_en: I—It's just the lighting effects...

t_ch: 你害羞啦！嘿嘿，平时瞧着挺勇的，真没想到回答私密问题时却很可爱呢。
t_en: You're shy! Heehee, you always look so tough. I never thought you'd be so cute when it comes to personal questions like this.

t_ch: 好好好，让我们快进到下一个问题吧——
t_en: Fine then, let's fast forward on to the next question:

t_ch: 「你们小队以后还播吗？」这个嘛…我看这个问题就让我来替大家回答吧。
t_en: "Will your team keep streaming in the future?" This one... Let me answer this one for everybody.

t_ch: 以后肯定还播的呀，不过大家都有各自的生活，所以要组齐人也不容易，观众老爷们记得留意我们账号的开播预告呀。
t_en: We'll definitely keep streaming in the future, but everyone has their own lives to live, so it's hard to line everyone up. Remember to follow our channel and enable notifications.

t_ch: 我们出发前是有开播预告的，喜欢看团播的可以留意一下，动动您发财的小手，点个订阅点个关注！
t_en: We'll send out a notification for the stream before we head out. Keep an eye out for it if you like live streams, and see if those little hands of yours can click you a fortune. Don't forget to Like and Subscribe!

t_ch: 好啦，录完这段就结束了。观众都喜欢看真实反应，我只是稍微剪了一下……
t_en: Alright. We're done after we finish recording this section. Viewers all like real reacts. I just made small edits...

t_ch: …好嘞，老规矩，你来发帖吧。
t_en: ...Will do. We'll do the usual — you do the posting.

t_ch: 真是拿你没办法。
t_en: Whatever shall I do with you.

t_ch: 让我发，我最擅长发了！
t_en: Let me post it! I'm the best at posting!

t_ch: 放心吧，你的反应很可爱，肯定有不少人会买账的。
t_en: Don't worry, your reactions are very cute. There'll be plenty of people who would buy it.

t_ch: 今天也辛苦你了{NICKNAME}！回见！
t_en: Good work today once again, {NICKNAME}! Goodbye!

t_ch: 家人们！！！
t_en: Hello, chat!!

t_ch: 全体目光，向我看齐！我要宣布个事儿！
t_en: All eyes on me, please! I've an announcement to make!

t_ch: 又来？
t_en: Again?

t_ch: …不行，我反悔了，这么重要的事，我们去长乐天说！
t_en: ...No, I'm backing out. Something this important has to be covered... over at the Exalting Sanctum!

t_ch: 哎呀，就在这里说了呗。
t_en: *sigh* Just tell them here and now.

t_ch: 不行，我们的生活需要一些仪式感！
t_en: Nope. Where's your sense of ceremony when it comes to life!

t_ch: 我大概知道是什么事了…
t_en: I think I know what's going on here...

t_ch: 嘘，憋住，不许说，剧透的都是小狗。
t_en: Shhh, put a sock in it. No leaks! Snitches get stitches!

t_ch: 看来是好事，我们走吧。
t_en: Looks like good news. Let's go.

t_ch: 走走走。
t_en: C'mon, let's go.

t_ch: 一会在长乐天见。
t_en: See you soon in the Exalting Sanctum.

t_ch: 我长话短说，刚刚机巧鸟托运了一个包裹给我，我打开一看——
t_en: I'll keep it quick: A cycrane just delivered us a package. Opening it up, I saw...

t_ch: 又是银色奖牌！
t_en: Another silver medallion!

t_ch: 那东西不会重复发的吧？
t_en: They wouldn't send out another one of those things, would they?

t_ch: 不是啦，是金——色——奖——牌！就是那个达成百万粉丝才有的奖牌！
t_en: Nope, it's a gee-oh-el-dee GOLD medallion — for getting to one million subs!

t_ch: 那我恭喜你啊。
t_en: Congratulations are in order!

t_ch: 同喜同喜。
t_en: Thank you so much.

t_ch: 金色传说，肯定珍贵。
t_en: The legendary gold medallion! That must be precious.

t_ch: 再往上据我所知就没有更高级别的奖牌了，确实挺珍贵的。
t_en: As far as I'm aware, there's no higher medallion on offer. So yes, it's indeed quite precious.

t_ch: 之前是多亏大家帮忙，才拿到了银色奖牌，没想到这才多久啊…这么快就突破到百万粉丝了——当然，还是多亏了大家的帮忙。
t_en: Thank you so much to everyone who helped us get our silver medallion. It seems like just yesterday... but now we've already smashed through the million subs mark — and of course, it's all thanks to everyone's support, too.

t_ch: 吃喝玩乐庆祝庆祝是少不了的，不过…我觉得现在更重要的是，我们四个人难得结成小队，还闯出这么一番成绩出来。
t_en: We'll have to eat, drink, and make merry of course in celebration — but... I think what's more important right now is that we acknowledge how hard it's been for the four of us to make this team and put together such outstanding results.

t_ch: 我觉得，我们起码也该留个纪念，比如纪念视频什么的，你们觉得呢？
t_en: I think, we should at least commemorate the occasion somehow, such as a celebration live stream or something else. What do you think?

t_ch: 是怎么个纪念法？
t_en: What kind of commemoration were you thinking?

t_ch: 我想拍个纪念视频，然后留点合照什么的。
t_en: Shooting a vlog, and then taking some group photos or whatever.

t_ch: 我都行，听你的。
t_en: I'm down for anything. Up to you.

t_ch: 放心，我早有准备。
t_en: Don't worry. I've been waiting for just this moment.

t_ch: 我想和大家重新走一遍我直播的地方，有你们陪着我走…然后和过去直播的画面剪辑在一起，我觉得…还蛮有看头的，而且也很有纪念意义。
t_en: I want to revisit everywhere I've vlogged before, but together with you guys too... Then, I'll mix and splice that into scenes from those old streams. I think... it'll be really interesting, and also really memorable.

t_ch: 画面什么的我不懂，总之都听你的好了。
t_en: I don't understand the mixing part, so I'll just follow your lead.

t_ch: 听起来还挺感人的，能认识大家真好。
t_en: Sounds really touching. It's been so great getting to know everyone.

t_ch: 其实我们现在所处的地方就是其中一处——这里是我直播事业开始的地方…这里的每一块地砖我都觉得好亲切。
t_en: Actually, where we are right now is one of the locations... This is where my streaming career first kicked off... I know each and every street paver here intimately.

t_ch: 那是因为你刚来的时候抠地砖表演胸口碎大石，你当然会觉得亲切啦，你当时的街头表演真是令人惊讶。
t_en: That's because when you first came here, you kept prying them out of the ground and busking by smashing them on people's chest. Of course you'd know them intimately, as your street performances were unbelievable.

t_ch: 那都是过去的事了，我就是那会儿认识你的。
t_en: That's all in my past, back when I first met you.

t_ch: 时间过的好快啊，来，我们在这边拍个照好不好，{NICKNAME}，就拜托你了。
t_en: Time really flies! Come, let's snap a team photo right here. {NICKNAME}, could you please do the honors?

t_ch: 接下来该去金人巷了…那里的每一家店铺我都出过探店视频。
t_en: Next up is the Aurum Alley... I've done store tour vlogs in every single shop there.

t_ch: 那时候有固定的观众了，虽说数量不多，但有聊胜无。
t_en: Back then, we had a regular audience which might have been small, but it was better than nothing.

t_ch: 还记得吗这家店吗，当初我们一起来探店，老板娘人还蛮热情的。
t_en: Do you still remember this store? Back then, we did a store tour here and the boss was really excited.

t_ch: 噢，我想起来了，吃了那个什么翅根，辣得我差点哭了。
t_en: Oh, I remember. We ate those spicy buffalo wings, and I nearly cried.

t_ch: 下次有机会带{NICKNAME}过来吃，到时候看看{NICKNAME}哭不哭鼻子。
t_en: Next time we get the chance, let's bring {NICKNAME} over. We'll see if eating those makes {NICKNAME} ugly cry or not.

t_ch: 我还挺喜欢金人巷的，在这里也听说了裳裳和{NICKNAME}的「传奇故事」，笑死。
t_en: I quite like the Aurum Alley. I also heard about {NICKNAME} and Shangshang's "Legend" here. That was hilarious.

t_ch: 这不是那个大主播吗？
t_en: Hey, isn't that the famous vlogger?

t_ch: 没想到在这里能看到桂乃芬。
t_en: Never thought I'd see Guinaifen over here.

t_ch: 别急，等我给她拍张照。
t_en: Don't worry. I'll snap a quick pic of her.

t_ch: 然后就是去往绥园了，理由大家都懂的，走吧。
t_en: Next up it's time to go to Fyxestroll Garden and I think everyone knows the reason why. Let's go.

t_ch: 最后一站就是…绥园，和大家一起冒险的地方。
t_en: The final stop is... Fyxestroll Garden, where we've all adventured before.

t_ch: 虽说我们在这里被吓得不轻，但这里也是我直播生涯突飞猛进的开始……
t_en: Despite being scared by the horrors here, this is where the meteoric rise of my vlogging career really took flight...

t_ch: 没错，尽管有时候吓得半死……
t_en: That's right, even though it usually scares me half to death...

t_ch: 但大家站在一起就没什么好怕的了。
t_en: But if we stick together, there's nothing to be afraid of.

t_ch: 先别煽情，说好的惊喜呢。
t_en: Let's not sensationalize things. You promised a happy surprise.

t_ch: 别急，一会儿你就知道了。
t_en: Don't worry. You'll find out soon.

t_ch: 说得挺好的，再来几句吧。
t_en: That's a good way of putting it. Give me a few more lines.

t_ch: 我想想啊……
t_en: Let me think about it...

t_ch: 总之就是大家的美好回忆嘛，我们也算是「绥园战友」了。
t_en: Anyway, it's a nice memory for everyone. We're all veterans of Fyxestroll Garden now.

t_ch: 感觉这个地方…很适合留下点什么…要不，大家来拍张合影吧！
t_en: This place seems... like a great place to make a memory... How does everyone feel about taking a team photo?

t_ch: 我来做摄影师。
t_en: I'll take the pic.

t_ch: 你也必须入镜。
t_en: You have to be in it, too.
